title: Create: Industrial Chemistry
description: Chemical Engineering with the Create Mod
body:
Enjoy the fun of Chemical engineering with the Create mod
\
\
Community Discord for Create: Industrial Chemistry:

https://discord.gg/fGUhb7Mwv2
\
\
About:

Create: Industrial Chemistry implements A WHOLE BUNCH of stuff with chemistry, including lot of element and some cool/dangerous stuff you didn't get to do in your school's science lab

 

Content:

- Balloon: with a WHOLE making process, definitely a good challenge for you!

- Acid/Alkali system: acid/alkali burn that damage you permanently.

- Poisons: Chlorine, Carbon monoxide CHEMICAL WAFARE!!!

- Gas system: Gasses that ACTUALLY RISES!

- And lot other cool features!!!

 

FAQ:

- Why didn't you add ... compound?

- - I mean, if you think it actually is fun, go to discord server and tell everyone your awesome idea

- OH, NO! GAME CRASHED/BUG!!!

- - You can go to the github issues, and just informing, this mod is still in alpha
